passage: The city's new recycling program requires residents to separate paper, plastic, and glass into different bins. Collection trucks pick up each type of material on a different day of the week. Most residents [1]_____ the new system convenient, though some have complained about the additional sorting required.

passageMetadata.source: Adapted from a municipal services report

stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
explanation: This question tests subject-verb agreement with a straightforward plural subject. 'Most residents' is plural and requires the base form/plural present 'find.' The present tense matches the current, ongoing situation described.

distractorRationale.B: Correct. Plural present agreeing with 'Most residents.'
distractorRationale.C: Past tense—while grammatically possible, the present tense context ('requires,' 'pick up') makes present tense appropriate.
distractorRationale.D: Participle—cannot function as main verb without auxiliary.
